note: Live Galaxy (Galaxy Europe) provenance for the CellProfiler atmospheric-river tracking run. The workflow/main_workflow.ga was rebuilt from the GTN tutorial's own workflow (gxy.io/GTN:T00516, 'CP_object_tracking_example') and retargeted to ERA5 IVT frames (objects: Rivers). Verified 2026-06-23: the workflow imports to usegalaxy.eu and runs END-TO-END with all 13 steps green, including the final 'Run CellProfiler pipeline' runner. It produces TrackObjects measurements (per-object tracking columns) and tracked PNGs. The quantitative atmospheric-river characterisation (Guan-Waliser criteria) is the byte-comparable local same-algorithm path; the Galaxy run uses the tutorial's default CellProfiler parameters and demonstrates that the bioimaging tracking method executes in the Galaxy environment on Earth-system data.
method: CellProfiler object tracking (Starting Modules -> ColorToGray -> IdentifyPrimaryObjects -> MeasureObjectSizeShape -> MeasureObjectIntensity -> TrackObjects[Overlap] -> OverlayOutlines -> Tile -> SaveImages -> ExportToSpreadsheet)
target: Atmospheric rivers in ERA5 IVT (North Pacific, early February 2017), ARCO-ERA5
